title: Salary Cap Proposal and Market Records

source.title: News Wrap: Treasury pushes for $250 bill featuring Trump

segments.title: A Salary Cap Proposal
segments.audioText: Major League Baseball owners proposed a salary cap for the first time in decades today, something the players union has vowed to never accept.
segments.transcript: Major League Baseball owners proposed a salary cap for the first time in decades today, something the players union has vowed to never accept.
segments.translationZh: 美國職棒大聯盟班主今日幾十年來首次提出薪酬上限方案，而球員工會已經誓言絕不接受。

points.label: Major League Baseball owners
points.explanationZh: 呢度指 MLB 球隊班主；owners 係新聞入面常聽到嘅『擁有人、老闆』。

points.label: proposed a salary cap
points.explanationZh: proposed 係『提出』；salary cap 即薪酬上限，cap 聽落短而清楚。

points.label: for the first time in decades
points.explanationZh: 意思係『幾十年來第一次』；in decades 係常見新聞時間講法。

points.label: has vowed to never accept
points.explanationZh: vowed 係『誓言』，語氣比 promised 強；to never accept 即絕不接受。

segments.title: The Payroll Range
segments.audioText: Under the proposal, teams would need to maintain a payroll of at least $171.2 million and couldn't exceed $245.3 million.
segments.transcript: Under the proposal, teams would need to maintain a payroll of at least $171.2 million and couldn't exceed $245.3 million.
segments.translationZh: 根據呢個方案，球隊需要維持至少一億七千一百二十萬美元嘅薪酬開支，而且唔可以超過二億四千五百三十萬美元。

points.label: Under the proposal
points.explanationZh: 新聞常用開頭，意思係『根據呢個方案』，幫你知道之後係講規則。

points.label: would need to maintain
points.explanationZh: would need to 表示如果方案通過就需要；maintain 係維持。

points.label: a payroll of at least
points.explanationZh: payroll 指薪酬總額；at least 係至少，後面通常跟數字。

points.label: couldn't exceed
points.explanationZh: exceed 係超過；couldn't exceed 即唔可以超過某個上限。

segments.title: Possible Lockout
segments.audioText: If the two sides can't reach a deal before the current contract expires in December, owners could lock out the players.
segments.transcript: If the two sides can't reach a deal before the current contract expires in December, owners could lock out the players.
segments.translationZh: 如果雙方喺現有合約十二月到期前未能達成協議，班主可能會禁止球員開工。

points.label: If the two sides can't reach a deal
points.explanationZh: two sides 指談判雙方；reach a deal 係達成協議。

points.label: before the current contract expires
points.explanationZh: current contract 係現有合約；expires 指到期。

points.label: owners could lock out the players
points.explanationZh: lock out 係勞資談判入面嘅『資方停工』；聽到 could 表示可能性。

segments.title: Stocks Climb
segments.audioText: On Wall Street today, stocks climbed to new records after the latest round of strong corporate earnings.
segments.transcript: On Wall Street today, stocks climbed to new records after the latest round of strong corporate earnings.
segments.translationZh: 今日華爾街股市喺最新一輪強勁企業盈利之後升到新高。

points.label: On Wall Street today
points.explanationZh: 新聞轉去金融市場時常用；Wall Street 代表美國股市。

points.label: stocks climbed to new records
points.explanationZh: climbed 係升；new records 即新高位。

points.label: strong corporate earnings
points.explanationZh: corporate earnings 指公司盈利；strong 係表現好、數字強。

segments.title: Nasdaq Jumped
segments.audioText: The Nasdaq jumped nearly 250 points, or almost 1 percent.
segments.transcript: The Nasdaq jumped nearly 250 points, or almost 1 percent.
segments.translationZh: 納斯達克指數升咗接近二百五十點，即差唔多百分之一。

points.label: The Nasdaq
points.explanationZh: Nasdaq 係美國主要股票指數之一，科技股比較多。

points.label: jumped nearly 250 points
points.explanationZh: jumped 喺財經新聞入面即大幅上升；nearly 係接近。

points.label: or almost 1 percent
points.explanationZh: or 喺呢度係補充另一種講法；almost 1 percent 即差唔多百分之一。

sentences: Major League Baseball owners proposed a salary cap for the first time in decades today, something the players union has vowed to never accept.
Under the proposal, teams would need to maintain a payroll of at least $171.2 million and couldn't exceed $245.3 million.
If the two sides can't reach a deal before the current contract expires in December, owners could lock out the players.
On Wall Street today, stocks climbed to new records after the latest round of strong corporate earnings.
The Nasdaq jumped nearly 250 points, or almost 1 percent.

vocabulary.example: A salary cap limits how much teams can spend.
vocabulary.translationZh: 薪酬上限會限制球隊可以用幾多錢。

vocabulary.example: The players union has vowed to never accept it.
vocabulary.translationZh: 球員工會誓言絕不接受。

vocabulary.example: Teams would need to maintain a payroll of at least $171.2 million.
vocabulary.translationZh: 球隊需要維持至少一億七千一百二十萬美元嘅薪酬總額。
球隊唔可以超過二億四千五百三十萬美元。

vocabulary.example: The current contract expires in December.
Stocks climbed after strong corporate earnings.
vocabulary.translationZh: 股市喺強勁企業盈利後上升。
納斯達克升咗接近二百五十點。

phrases.phrase: for the first time in decades
phrases.example: Owners proposed a salary cap for the first time in decades.
Under the proposal, teams would need to maintain a payroll.
The two sides need to reach a deal before December.

phrases.meaningZh: 資方禁止球員開工；封鎖球員
phrases.example: Owners could lock out the players.

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 由 03:10 開始跟讀第一句，留意 proposed a salary cap / for the first time in decades 兩個節奏位。
重播 03:28，先聽數字前後嘅字：at least 同 couldn't exceed，再補返金額。
模仿 04:14 嘅財經新聞句式：On Wall Street today, stocks climbed to new records...
用兩句英文複述：MLB owners proposed a salary cap. Stocks also climbed after strong earnings.

notes: 今日嘅聽力重點係商業同體育新聞常見句式：proposed, under the proposal, reach a deal, climbed to new records。
數字句唔使一次聽晒；先抓 at least、couldn't exceed、nearly 呢啲提示字，再重聽數字。
用時間碼由 03:10 開始逐句重播，先盲聽，再對照 PBS 頁面嘅 closed captions/transcript。
今次選用片段入面較中性、生活化嘅商業同體育部分，避免把練習變成政治討論。

dailyLifePractice.title: Quick Work Update
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你喺公司用簡短英文交代一件事嘅進度，同新聞入面 reach a deal / proposal 呢類講法呼應。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Quick update: we sent the proposal this morning. We're still waiting on their feedback. If they approve it today, we can move forward tomorrow.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Quick update: we sent the proposal this morning.
lines.zh: 簡短更新：我哋今朝已經 send 咗個 proposal。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Not yet. We're still waiting on their feedback.
lines.zh: 未呀。我哋仲等緊佢哋嘅 feedback。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: If they approve it today, we can move forward tomorrow.
lines.zh: 如果佢哋今日 approve，聽日就可以繼續下一步。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Quick update 係美國職場好自然嘅開場。waiting on their feedback 比 waiting for their feedback 更口語，但兩個都啱。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 proposal 換成 report、schedule 或 quote，再講一次。
drills.example: Quick update: we sent the report this morning.

drills.label: Say-it-your-way
drills.prompt: 用 If they approve it today 開頭，講一個你工作上會用嘅下一步。
drills.example: If they approve it today, I can book the room tomorrow.

dailyLifePractice.title: Explaining a Delay
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你因為等對方回覆而延遲，想講得自然又唔怪責人。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Sorry, this is taking a little longer than expected. We're waiting on one more confirmation. I'll send you an update as soon as I have it.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Sorry, this is taking a little longer than expected.
lines.zh: 唔好意思，呢件事比預期耐少少。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Yes, we're just waiting on one more confirmation.
lines.zh: 係，冇問題，只係仲等緊最後一個 confirmation。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I'll send you an update as soon as I have it.
lines.zh: 我一有就會即刻 send update 畀你。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: taking a little longer than expected 聽落比 it's delayed 柔和。as soon as I have it 係好常用嘅承諾式收尾。

drills.label: Polite rephrase
drills.prompt: 將 It's late 改成較自然禮貌嘅講法。
drills.example: It's taking a little longer than expected.

drills.label: Quick repeat
drills.prompt: 連續跟讀 I'll send you an update as soon as I have it 三次。
drills.example: I'll send you an update as soon as I have it.

dailyLifePractice.title: Price Check in a Store
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你買嘢時想確認價錢或折扣，配合今日新聞入面聽數字嘅練習。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Hi, could you check the price on this for me? The shelf tag says it's on sale. I just want to make sure before I check out.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Hi, could you check the price on this for me?
lines.zh: 你好，可唔可以幫我 check 下呢件嘢幾錢？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: The shelf tag says it's on sale.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I just want to make sure before I check out.
lines.zh: 我只係想付款前確認一下。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: could you check... for me? 好自然又有禮貌。check out 喺美國店舖通常解付款／結帳。

drills.label: Role-play
drills.prompt: 你做 customer 講第一句，再做 staff 回 Sure, let me scan it。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 price 換成 size、color、discount，練三次。
drills.example: Could you check the discount on this for me?
